channel.title: Neue Zeitschrift für Systematische Theologie und Religionsphilosophie
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Neue Zeitschrift für Systematische Theologie und Religionsphilosophie

item.title: Dialogue and Relational Ontology: Rethinking the Significance of the Second-Person Perspective
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2025-0002

item.title: On Not Speaking
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0037

item.title: Ethical-Religious Seduction: Laplanche and Kierkegaard on the Priority of the Other
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0027

item.title: When the Second-Person Perspective is the First: On the Interconnection between Second- and First-Person Perspective regarding an Individual’s Self-Relationship and its Theological Consequences
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0070

item.title: A Dialogue of Mutual Recognition
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2025-0001

item.title: The Epistemic and Other Virtues of Non-Socratic Dialogue
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0066

item.title: Rejoinder to Menachem Fisch: A Few Stubbornly Penultimate Reflections
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0068

item.title: Heiko Schulz, Perfect Partner in Dialogue
item.description: Article by Menachem Fisch DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/nzsth-2024-0067
